div.head: The Acting Secretary of the Navy (Coontz) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to acknowledge receipt of your letter of July 12th, relating to the recent trial and sentence of certain Dominicans. I enclose herewith copy of the dispatch forwarded to the Acting Military Governor today.Not printed; it contained instructions to “suspend at once sentence imposed on Dominicans tried for inciting people to resist payment of land tax.”
Rear Admiral S. S. Robison is returning to San Domingo at once with instructions to comply with the wishes of the State Department.
